name: dcomExec
description: Execute a command over DCOM with the flags parsed by DcomExec::init().

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

command.description: Executable or command to start remotely.

working_dir.description: Optional remote working directory passed with -w.

username.description: Optional username passed with -u. If set, also set password or no_password.

no_password.description: Include -n to use no password/current credential behavior.
